title: Senior Cricket Festival kicks off
description: CRICKET NEWS & VIDEO - It is the first...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRICKET NEWS & VIDEO - It is the first day of the 17th annual Senior Cricket Festival, where Edgemead High School is taking on Union High School in a very good game.","html":"CRICKET NEWS & VIDEO - It is the first day of the 17th annual Senior Cricket Festival, where Edgemead High School is taking on Union High School in a very good game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union High School still needs to bat.","html":"Union High School still needs to bat."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Currently, the score is 158 for 7.","html":"Currently, the score is 158 for 7."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Watch a video below:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
